content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To : Advice File                                     Date : June 24, 1976

                                                     1976-06-065

From : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
       Nan [illegible] (corrupted) Hamilton

Subject: Repayment of a Loan by a Third Party
         Government Code Section 82013(b)

At the opinion request meeting on June 21, 1976, the
staff determined that since payment of a loan by a
third party is not made directly to the candidate or
committee, the person who makes payments totaling
$500 or more in a calendar year on loans in behalf
of candidates or campaign committees is an "expenditure
Committee" under Section 82013(b).

sections.conclusion: Since payment of a loan by a third party is not made directly to the candidate or committee, the person who makes payments totaling $500 or more in a calendar year on loans in behalf of candidates or campaign committees is an 'expenditure Committee' under Section 82013(b).
sections.question_synthetic: Whether a third party who makes loan repayments totaling $500 or more in a calendar year on behalf of candidates or campaign committees constitutes an 'expenditure committee' under Government Code Section 82013(b).
sections.conclusion_synthetic: FPPC staff determined that a third party making loan repayments of $500 or more in a calendar year on behalf of candidates or committees qualifies as an 'expenditure committee' under Government Code Section 82013(b), since such payments are not made directly to the candidate or committee.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Internal memorandum format without traditional Q/A sections; conclusion derived from staff determination statement at opinion request meeting; limited context provided

QUESTION: Whether a third party who makes loan repayments totaling $500 or more in a calendar year on behalf of candidates or campaign committees constitutes an 'expenditure committee' under Government Code Section 82013(b).

CONCLUSION: Since payment of a loan by a third party is not made directly to the candidate or committee, the person who makes payments totaling $500 or more in a calendar year on loans in behalf of candidates or campaign committees is an 'expenditure Committee' under Section 82013(b).
